NIST ACVP SLH-DSA Test Vectors

Source: https://github.com/usnistgov/ACVP-Server
        (via Trail of Bits go-slh-dsa KAT/ directory)
License: Public domain (U.S. Government work)

Files:
  keygen.json  - Key generation vectors (120 tests, all 12 FIPS 205 param sets)
  sigGen.json  - Signature generation vectors (624 tests, pure + pre-hash + deterministic)
  sigVer.json  - Signature verification vectors (504 tests, positive + negative)

See THIRD_PARTY_LICENSES in the repository root for full license details.
